items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: FSK sets Q1 2020 earnings release for May 6, conference call scheduled
items.snippet: FSK plans to release first quarter 2020 results after the close on May 6, 2020.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure
8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: FSK posts Q4 2019 NII of $0.20/share, declares Q1 2020 regular distribution of $0.19
items.snippet: FSK Q4 2019 NII was $0.20/share; Q1 2020 regular distribution declared at $0.19/share with full-year 2019 results disclosed.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: FSK sets Q4 and full-year 2019 earnings release for February 27
items.snippet: FSK plans to release fourth quarter and full year 2019 results after the close on February 27, 2020.
